extortion.description: Signal Hill, CA offers a range of services and resources to its residents, including city hall renovation updates, a shop local campaign called Open Rewards, and information on upcoming city events. The city also provides resources for job seekers, safe clean water initiatives, and community assistance programs. Residents can access the city's cable channel online, nominate pets for Pet of the Month, and download the Signal Hill Now mobile app for convenient access to city information. Employees: 50 Revenue: $7.1 Million Industry: Government  Phone Number: (562) 989-7300
